parsed.production_notes: The character exhibits unnaturally smooth skin texture, slightly stiff micro-expressions, and imperfect lip-syncing characteristic of AI video generation. The lighting and background are perfectly static.

characters.appearance: Young woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, wavy auburn hair, brown eyes, and full lips.
characters.wardrobe: Cream-colored blouse with a gathered neckline, large gold hoop earrings, and layered delicate gold necklaces.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and professional, maintaining direct eye contact.

scenes.setting: Plain, light grey studio background, soft even lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera. She is positioned from the chest up against a plain, solid light grey wall. The lighting is soft and even, casting minimal shadows. Her expression is warm and engaging as she speaks.

scenes.visual_description: A continuous, static shot of Character A speaking directly to the viewer. Subtitles appear at the bottom center of the screen throughout the duration.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: La mejor manera de mejorar tu speaking es practicar todos los días. Y para eso estoy aquí. [The best way to improve your speaking is to practice every day. And that's what I'm here for.]
Character A says: Soy Loora, tu tutora de inglés con IA. [I am Loora, your AI English tutor.]
Character A says: Conmigo, puedes practicar en cualquier momento y lugar como lo harías con una persona real. [With me, you can practice anytime and anywhere like you would with a real person.]
Character A says: Charlaré contigo, te daré retroalimentación instantánea sobre tu pronunciación y te ayudaré a mejorar con cada conversación. [I will chat with you, I will give you instant feedback on your pronunciation and help you improve with every conversation.]
Character A says: Es rápido, fácil y sin presión no tienes que preocuparte por cometer errores, porque te guiaré a través de ellos. [It's fast, easy, and pressure-free you don't have to worry about making mistakes, because I will guide you through them.]
Character A says: Practiquemos juntos todos los días y verás qué rápido mejora tu inglés. [Let's practice together every day and you will see how fast your English improves.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
La mejor manera de mejorar tu speaking (The best way to improve your speaking)
es practicar todos los días. (is to practice every day.)
Y para eso estoy aquí. (And that's what I'm here for.)
Soy Loora, (I am Loora,)
tu tutora de inglés con IA. (your AI English tutor.)
Conmigo, puedes practicar (With me, you can practice)
en cualquier momento y lugar (anytime and anywhere)
como lo harías con una persona real. (like you would with a real person.)
Charlaré contigo, (I will chat with you,)
te daré retroalimentación instantánea (I will give you instant feedback)
sobre tu pronunciación (on your pronunciation)
y te ayudaré a mejorar (and help you improve)
con cada conversación. (with every conversation.)
Es rápido, fácil y sin presión (It's fast, easy, and pressure-free)
no tienes que preocuparte por cometer errores, (you don't have to worry about making mistakes,)
porque te guiaré a través de ellos. (because I will guide you through them.)
Practiquemos juntos todos los días (Let's practice together every day)
y verás qué rápido mejora tu inglés. (and you will see how fast your English improves.)
